material_additions: attendance close blocker links directly to the first unresolved exception
attendance-to-payroll golden-path gates expose blocking reasons before close, calculation, exception handling, and approval submission
zero-state reconstruction and restore exercise for queue, notifications, schedule, and composer-driven recovery
dispatch unassigned and SLA counts derive from the active row collection instead of fixed prototype numbers
product_interpretation: blocking fix links require a real routable source object and may not be copied as inert prototype controls
session-only seed clearing is prototype test support, not a production settings capability
zero-state reconstruction belongs in isolated dev-auth provisioning and end-to-end tests
operational counts must derive from authorized backend collections or aggregate contracts

evaluation.comparison_note: The reference and candidate captures have different native dimensions; the score is an orientation baseline, not a pixel-perfect or Visual Ralph gate.
material_gaps: Information architecture differs: todo and timeline versus the reference task table and selected-detail workspace.
The expanded communication rail dominates the available workspace.
Summary, view, create, and workflow tools required by the reference are missing.
Density and scan hierarchy are materially weaker than the reference.
Generic heavy cards replace the reference's compact operational composition.

latest_evaluation.comparison_note: The responsive shell is materially safer and more usable, but this medium-width capture keeps the communications rail compact and the todo-only My Work body remains far from the 1280x720 reference. Unequal viewports prevent desktop-parity proof.
shell_improvements: Stable top bar and global search.
Compact persistent left navigation with active state.
Usable central region at medium width.
highest_leverage_gaps: Replace the todo-only body with a real queue, selected-task detail, and today/calendar/timeline workspace.
Complete the real Messenger, Mail, notification, and activity rail with an accessible medium-width drawer trigger.
Render real task type, status, priority/SLA, assignee, due time, linked object, workflow, and audit fields.
Add real-filter operational summary counts that drill into evidence.
Move typography, metadata density, card chrome, and desktop grid toward the pinned Claude reference.

observed_state: exact reference key and due-time fields
real Messenger, Mail, notification, and notice rail data
latest_live_replay.claim_boundary: local dev-auth runtime evidence only; not visual parity, independent review, release, deployment, or production evidence

invalidation_rules: A Claude Design ETag or export digest change requires impact classification and re-evaluation of affected states.
A candidate source change after capture invalidates candidate visual approval.
A missing tool version, state matrix, image, or rubric prevents release use.
